name: reactor-dojo
description: Tutored, constrained build of a single-threaded reactor (event-loop) server in Ruby, from a blocking accept loop to a nonblocking IO.select reactor that juggles thousands of connections. Claude Code acts as a Socratic tutor: it quizzes you, reasons about your answers, and makes you type the load-bearing code yourself while it handles glue and review. Offline by design.
